python-research.summary: Python research minimum; extend only from stated deliverables.

r-research.summary: R research minimum; does not impose Python packaging.

mixed-research.summary: Mixed Python/R/LaTeX minimum with shared data and explicit paper boundary.

paper-only.summary: Manuscript-first minimum; no code or data tree unless the work actually needs one.

existing-custom.summary: Preserve an existing custom repository or monorepo; inventory before proposing any target tree.
